role: A React overlay component that hosts the transcript corpus search surface and renders the result constellation through DNA's generic archetype renderer.
capabilities: Open/close overlay via window `transcript:open` event and Escape key
Search input with query state bound to transcriptStore
Submit semantic corpus search and retry on error
Fetch and cache the `transcript-viz` DNA archetype from `/dna/layouts.json`
Render SVG constellation graph via `DNA.org.constellation` and `DNA.renderArchetype`
Display loading, error, empty-prompt, and no-match states
Close via scrim click, close button, or Escape
substance_why: It implements the full overlay lifecycle, search form, all message states, and the DNA graph mounting path, leaving only the actual drawing to external DNA helpers.
interactions_present: Escape key closes the overlay when open
Error message retry button re-runs the search
interactions_missing: No click/selection interaction on constellation stars or sessions
No pagination, infinite scroll, or result count handling for large result sets
No keyboard focus trap inside the modal dialog
No explicit failure UX for the `/dna/layouts.json` fetch beyond silent degradation
No session drill-down from the graph
performance_risks: Effect reruns whenever `raw` reference changes, regenerating the entire constellation and replacing DOM children
No memoization of the adapted record or SVG device
Query input updates store on every keystroke, causing re-renders without throttling
Async archetype fetch has no AbortController, and stale closures can write to a replaced host node
Large `raw` envelopes are passed whole to the adapter with no size guarding
reuse_why: The overlay search flow and state transitions are worth keeping, but the imperative DNA-global coupling, archetype fetch, and DOM mounting should be rebuilt for the new design system.
decomposition_hints: Split the overlay shell (header, search form, message states, close handling) from the graph renderer adapter
Extract DNA archetype loading and `transcriptRecord`/`constellation` invocation into a dedicated visualization service/hook
Move store actions and selectors (`useTranscript`, `searchTranscript`, etc.) into a separate store module if not already
Separate CSS into component-scoped or design-system tokens
